code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has = false
  mut got_a = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let bo = string.byte_at(line, i)
    match bo
    when Some(by)
      if by >= 48 and by <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (by - 48)
        has = true
      else if by == 45 and not has
        sign = -1
      else
        if has
          if got_a
            b = cur * sign
          else
            a = cur * sign
            got_a = true
          end
          cur = 0
          sign = 1
          has = false
        end
      end
    when None
      cur = cur
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if got_a
      b = cur * sign
    else
      a = cur * sign
    end
  end
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
